title: Building Package
description: All-in-one collection of creative building and NBT tools!! For map makers, datapackers, or general builders!
body:
![Building Package!! Modpack Logo](https://github.com/bluffcon/building_package/blob/main/building_package.png?raw=true)
# Building tools, all united!
ℹ️ ;; When I got bored and wanted to build a simple map with Axiom and alike, I found out that there aren't any packs like that! It was a real shame, so I made this one for everyone to use!

## Contents!!
🔨 :: This modpack features some strong building tools, optimizations, and cosmetic improvements! Giant-scale building with **Axiom**, posing with **Armor Stands**, a head, text, banner generator provided by **FZMM**, Datapack tools, Server Resource Pack utilities, Unicode character gallery, and many many more!

📊 :: If you value optimization, the pack is shipped with **Sodium and Lithium,** their addons, and some other culling mods to make sure your game doesn't lag! Iris and some **shaders** _(Complimentary, Fullbright, others)_ are also included, in case you want to see how everything looks fully done!

⚙️ :: This pack runs on Fabric, of the latest version. Most mods are client-side.

🏆 :: UI quality of life features are also included, like a cuter menu with **FancyMenu** with a dedicated *Menu Editing Mode* that allows you to move buttons around freely to make your own layout!

## Crash?
💀 :: The most common issue would be that your launcher named the modpack folder with the "!!" included, which makes Fabric unable to launch. Rename the folder to not have this special symbol.

## Unknown mods?
📖 :: Even if you're just starting out with these mods, the **Guide** button in the main menu has a list of featured mods and their main keybinds! Everything comes pre-configured, but if you want to change things up, Mod Menu allows for more customization!

## Afterword
🧧 :: This modpack is very simple, but if you feel the need, you can suggest more features or report bugs on the ⚠️ [issues Tracker](https://github.com/bluffcon/building_package/issues) over on GitHub! This pack will continue to get updates for a long time after its first release!
